basics.name: Ircham Ali
basics.summary: Informatics Lecturer and PhD Student in Information Systems

publications.name: Decision Support Systems for Land Suitability Evaluation on Rice Cultivation using ELECTRE Method
publications.publisher: The 5th International Conference on Energy, Environmental and Information System (ICENIS 2020)
publications.summary: The result shows that the application of this method is quite effective for decision making so that alternatives are obtained that have the highest land use suitability compared to other alternatives for environmentally friendly rice cultivation.

publications.name: Land-use suitability evaluation for organic rice cultivation using fuzzy-AHP ELECTRE method
publications.publisher: Register: Jurnal Ilmiah Teknologi Sistem Informasi
publications.summary: This study's results indicate that integrating the web with fuzzy-AHP ELECTRE is quite effectively applied for decision-making in organic farming.

publications.name: Arduino Microcontroller-Based Automatic Irrigation System for Grape Cultivation
publications.publisher: Journal of Artificial Intelligence and Engineering Applications (JAIEA)
publications.summary: The purpose of this research is to design an automatic irrigation system based on soil humidity levels for grapevines that is more adaptable and accurate to support grapevine cultivation in Indonesia's tropical climate.

publications.name: IoT-Based Smart Fertigation System for Citrus Plants using Fuzzy Logic Control
publications.publisher: Journal of Information Systems and Informatics
publications.summary: Overall, the IoT–FLC integration provides a more adaptive and eco-efficient irrigation model that promotes sustainable management of water and nutrients in tropical citrus cultivation.
